description: Local runner for the pipemason development pipeline
notes: You're installed. Three steps to your first run:
1. Create an account at https://pipemason.com (14-day free trial).
2. Pair this machine to your account:  pipemason login
3. From inside any git repo, kick off a run:  pipemason start "add a /version endpoint"
Or use the interactive walkthrough:  pipemason setup
